title: Bottom agar: 1.5% w/v LB(Miller) agar
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2o2qm","text":"How to make the bottom agar for plaque assay experiment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Components Final concentration For 1 L 1 Agar 1.5% 15 g 2 NaCl 1% w/v 10 g 3 Tryptone 1% w/v 10 g 4 Yeast extract 0.5% w/v 5 g Dissolve following components in 1 L MilliQ water
Pour onto petri dishes (approximately 20 mL per plate (10 cm diameter plates)).
